_authoring_note: Hand-authored from reading src/click/*.py directly (not copied from OrthoAdapter output). Scope: core library package only (src/click/), not examples/ or tests/. core.py is 3681 lines (30% of the whole package's LOC) and contains Command/Group/Context/Parameter/Option -- the entire object model in one file, with formatting/parser/types/decorators/shell_completion as thin supporting modules around it. This is genuinely closer to a flat/monolithic-core architecture than a layered one; Click's own docs describe it as 'a simple API without too much magic', consistent with a shallow structure.
